name: Earth

coverSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 200"><defs><radialGradient id="globe" cx="40%" cy="40%" r="60%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3B82F6"/><stop offset="60%" stop-color="#1E40AF"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0B1D3A"/></radialGradient><radialGradient id="hl" cx="30%" cy="25%" r="40%"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff" stop-opacity=".25"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff" stop-opacity="0"/></radialGradient></defs><rect width="200" height="200" fill="#050A18"/><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="82" fill="url(#globe)"/><g fill="#16A34A"><path d="M55,75 q10,-8 22,-2 q12,4 18,16 q-4,12 -16,14 q-14,2 -22,-6 q-8,-8 -2,-22 z"/><path d="M120,55 q14,-2 22,8 q6,12 -2,22 q-10,8 -22,4 q-14,-4 -10,-20 q4,-10 12,-14 z"/><path d="M70,125 q8,-2 16,4 q10,8 8,18 q-4,10 -16,8 q-14,-2 -16,-14 q-2,-12 8,-16 z"/><path d="M135,115 q8,4 14,12 q4,12 -8,18 q-14,4 -22,-6 q-6,-12 4,-20 q6,-6 12,-4 z"/><path d="M105,140 q8,2 8,12 q0,8 -10,8 q-10,0 -10,-10 q0,-10 12,-10 z"/></g><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="82" fill="url(#hl)"/><circle cx="100" cy="100" r="82" fill="none" stroke="#3B82F6" stroke-width=".5" opacity=".4"/></svg>
